full_text:
Zhou Yi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Yi. Notorious, feigned surrender and was arrested. Zhuge Ke’s release of him helped persuade Shanyue to submit. Zhou Yi was affiliated with Shanyue and the Wu Kingdom.
